problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Combining Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
